resturants.name: PuraSecurus Diner
resturants.description: A cozy diner offering classic American dishes with a modern twist.

menu.name: Classic Burger
menu.description: A juicy beef patty with lettuce, tomato, and our special sauce.

menu.name: PuraSecurus Salad
menu.description: A fresh mix of greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, and our house vinaigrette.

menu.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
menu.description: Marinated grilled chicken breast with lettuce, tomato, and mayo on a toasted bun.

resturants.name: Securus Sushi Bar
resturants.description: An upscale sushi bar serving fresh and innovative sushi creations.

menu.name: Securus Roll
menu.description: A signature roll with spicy tuna, avocado, and tempura flakes.

menu.name: Dragon Roll
menu.description: Eel and cucumber roll topped with avocado and eel sauce.

menu.name: Vegetarian Roll
menu.description: A delicious roll filled with cucumber, avocado, and carrot.

resturants.name: PuraSecurus Pizzeria
resturants.description: A casual pizzeria offering a variety of delicious pizzas and Italian dishes.

menu.name: Margherita Pizza
menu.description: Classic pizza with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil.
